Design System v0.10.0
Overview Foundations Components Themes Playground
Layout
  • App-Shell Layout-Primitive
  • Card Component
  • Divider Component
  • List-Row Component
  • Panel-List Component
  • Section Component
Form
  • Button Component
  • Checkbox + Radio Components
  • Combobox Component
  • Date-Input Component
  • Field Component
  • File-Upload Component
  • Range-Slider Component
  • Search-Input Component
  • Select Component
  • Slider Component
  • Switch Component
Feedback
  • Alert Component
  • Banner Component
  • Callout Component
  • Empty-State Component
  • Progress Component
  • Skeleton Loader
  • Spinner Component
  • Toast / Notification Component
Navigation
  • Accordion Component
  • Breadcrumbs Component
  • Nav Component
  • Pagination Component
  • Steps Component
  • Tabs Component
  • Tree Component
Overlay
  • Drawer Component
  • Modal Component
  • Popover Component
  • Tooltip Component
Data Display
  • Avatar Component
  • Avatar-Stack Component
  • Badge Component
  • Chart Container
  • CodeBlock Component
  • Funnel Component
  • Stat Component
  • Table Component
  • Tag Component
  • Timeline Component
  • Trend Component
Primitive
  • Chevron Component
Feedback

Spinner Component

Indeterminate Loading-Indicator. Pures CSS, kein SVG, kein JS.

Beispiele

HTML anzeigen 
<span class="spinner" role="status" aria-label="Laden …"></span>

Inline in Button (Loading-State)

HTML anzeigen 
<button class="btn" disabled>
  <span class="spinner spinner--sm" aria-hidden="true"></span>
  Speichern
</button>

Block-centered Loading-State

HTML anzeigen 
<div class="spinner-block">
  <span class="spinner spinner--lg" role="status" aria-label="Lädt …"></span>
</div>

Token-Contract

TokenStatusNotiz
--spinner-size Optional Quadrat-Dimension (default 1.25rem ≈ 20px)
--spinner-stroke Optional Ring-Stroke-Width (default 2px)
--spinner-color Optional Sweeping-Arc-Farbe (default currentColor)
--spinner-track-color Optional Restkreis (default: 20% mix der Arc-Farbe)
--spinner-duration Optional Rotation pro Umdrehung (default 700ms)

Modifier

  • .spinner--sm — kleiner (z.B. inline in btn--sm)
  • .spinner--lg — größer (für Page-Level-Loading)
Source-CSS ansehen
